name: Fat Free Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Toast 1 1/4 cups uncooked oats (quick or old-fashioned) until they barely start to turn golden.
3. Soak 1 cup raisins in water for 10 minutes, then remove and drain.
4. Beat together Mixture No. 2 into Mixture No. 1.
5. Fold in toasted oats and raisins.
6. Drop by spoonful onto prepared cookie sheets.
7. Bake for approximately 9 minutes at 350 degrees.
Note: Remove from oven when cookies are lightly golden brown. Allow to cool on wire racks before serving.
